meta.objective: Remove repetitive lesson instructions and duplicate content, and ensure every intended interactive lab is visibly present before its prediction/reflection section.

tasks.title: Remove redundant lesson scaffolding
tasks.objective: Keep the detailed objective teaching while removing repeated narrative and verbose procedural framing from every lesson page.
acceptanceCriteria: The By the end section keeps exact objective coverage but no longer includes explanatory meta-copy.
The duplicate chapter narrative is not rendered after objective coverage.
Shared activity and scroll-story framing no longer displays Do, Observe, Explain, Complete when, or before-moving instructions.
Focused content and interaction tests pass.
tasks.details: Edit shared lesson/activity/scroll renderers and their regression tests; retain evidence boundaries and objective checks.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: The By the end section keeps exact objective coverage but no longer includes explanatory meta-copy.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Exact objective cards and committed checks remain; header meta-copy removed.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: The duplicate chapter narrative is not rendered after objective coverage.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: chapter-narrative renderer removed and regression asserts its absence.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Shared activity and scroll-story framing no longer displays Do, Observe, Explain, Complete when, or before-moving instructions.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Shared activity frame now shows only Question and Scope; scroll cue removed.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Focused content and interaction tests pass.

commit.message: Task T001: remove redundant lesson scaffolding

tasks.title: Restore visible interactive labs across the curriculum
tasks.objective: Render the working lab instrument before any prediction/reflection prompt on every released lesson and prove complete lesson-to-lab wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: The LLM Introduction prediction lab renders its interactive instrument immediately.
LLM, World Model, Generative, RL, and Embodied lab renderers place controls/readouts before concise reflection prompts.
An executable regression verifies every one of the 182 released lessons has a supported lab.
The interaction audit documents the new visual order and evidence boundary.
npm run lint and npm test pass.
tasks.details: Refactor the three shared lab surfaces, update interaction tests and docs, then run focused and full required checks.

validationCommands.command: node --test tests/content-ux.test.mjs tests/interactive-learning.test.mjs tests/objective-coverage.test.mjs tests/world-model-curriculum.test.mjs tests/course-data.test.mjs tests/generative-course.test.mjs tests/rl-course.test.mjs tests/embodied-course.test.mjs

validationCommands.evidence: Static export and artifacts verified; 160 passed, 0 failed

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: The LLM Introduction prediction lab renders its interactive instrument immediately.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Introduction remains wired to PredictionLab and the instrument renders in PredictionGate preview before reflection.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: LLM, World Model, Generative, RL, and Embodied lab renderers place controls/readouts before concise reflection prompts.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: All three shared lab renderers expose controls/readouts first; explanation revision preserves instrument state.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: An executable regression verifies every one of the 182 released lessons has a supported lab.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: interactive-learning.test.mjs joins every released lesson to supported lab metadata, renderer, or authored research spec.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: The interaction audit documents the new visual order and evidence boundary.
